positive: A stylized illustration of a majestic soaring raven flying through a crystalline, bioluminescent forest at twilight. The raven is depicted with highly defined feathers and an elegant, sharp silhouette. The forest elements include stylized ferns, glowing mushroom clusters, and winding roots, all rendered with a strong, high-contrast line art aesthetic overlaid onto a gradient watercolor wash of deep indigo, emerald green, and amethyst. The composition is central and dynamic, making the raven the focal point against the vibrant, clean botanical backdrop. Print-ready, minimalist detail, symmetrical balance, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blur, noise, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifacts, multiple subjects, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, low detail, amateur, sketch, cartoonish, realistic photo
